core_mechanism: profiling a model's residual error as a function of a predetermined ordering coordinate (a residual-vs-covariate diagnostic curve), distinguishing global goodness-of-fit from coordinate-resolved local behaviour such as flattening, overshoot, or sign-crossing of the residual along that axis
brief_reason: The abstract traces model alphas (pricing errors) across the full order induced by a predetermined characteristic and classifies where corrections land along that axis (flatten, overshoot, cross zero), contrasting this with a single scalar spanning/Sharpe measure.
